reasoning:

Given that the majority of this window has passed without a highly visible qualifying event, the probability is adjusted downward to 22%, reflecting the remaining 7 days and the slight chance an unreported or less prominent event occurred.

For the second resolution date (2026-03-17), the window spans the upcoming 30 days (Feb 15 to Mar 17). With no days having elapsed, the estimate rests firmly on the historical base rate.
